title: Task
description: A unit of work to be executed by an AI code assistant.

id.description: Unique identifier (UUID v4), auto-generated on creation.

prompt.description: Instructions for the AI code assistant.

branch_name.description: Target git branch name. Must conform to git-check-ref-format rules.

status.description: Current lifecycle state of the task.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of task creation.

position.description: Queue ordering. Lower positions are executed first.
